copy_from.description: Optional existing overlay id to clone configuration from
copy_from.title: Copy From

get.description:
Return every custom overlay persisted on disk.

Each entry carries the overlay id (the part after the ``C-`` prefix),
its derived output key and the corresponding OID clients should use
when pointing the scoreboard at the overlay.

post.description: Create a new custom overlay, optionally cloning an existing one.

delete.description: Remove a custom overlay and its persisted state.

post.description: Validate the admin password. Returns ``{"ok": true}`` on success.

get.description: Report whether overlay management is enabled on this server.
Return control, overlay, and preview links for the session.

Return predefined overlays available for selection.

Sourced exclusively from the ``PREDEFINED_OVERLAYS`` environment
variable (also populated via the remote configurator). Entries are
filtered by ``allowed_users`` using the caller's identity when user
authentication is enabled.

schema.title: Response Get Overlays Api V1 Overlays Get

post.description: Initialise (or re-use) a game session for the given overlay ID.

get.description: Return predefined team names with icon/color data.

Return every overlay id plus its output key.

Gated behind ``OVERLAY_MANAGER_PASSWORD`` because the response
defeats the capability-URL design of ``/overlay/{output_key}``.
See ``AUTHENTICATION.md`` (F-4).
